chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI. C.P No. D-3413 of 2025 Date Order with Signature(s) of the Judge (s) 1. For hearing of main case. 27.08.2025. None present for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Addl. P.G, Sindh. ************* Since the SCNS Act has been amended by the Government of Sindh and the alternate remedy has been provided; therefore, this petition stands disposed of with the directions to the petitioner to approach learned trial court for his appropriate relief. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS*
